facets.name: antimage_magebanes_mirror
facets.title: Magebane's Mirror
facets.description: Spells countered by Counterspell will immediately burn a percentage of its mana cost from the enemy and deal damage based on the burned mana cost.

facets.name: antimage_mana_thirst
facets.title: Mana Thirst
facets.description: Anti-Mage gains damage when his enemies are at low mana.

shard.shard_desc: Creates a blinked fragment of Anti-Mage next to the enemy caster upon reflecting their unit-targeted spell while active.

aghanim_scepter.scepter_desc: After casting Blink, your next Mana Break within 5s burns an additional 20% max mana and prevents the target from regenerating or gaining mana for a short duration. This debuff is undispellable.

facets.name: axe_one_man_army
facets.title: One Man Army
facets.description: Axe gains Strength based on his armor as long as he's away from his allies.

facets.name: axe_call_out
facets.title: Call Out
facets.description: Berserker's Call gives attacking enemies more attack speed and Axe more armor for the duration.

shard.shard_desc: Multiple instances of Battle Hunger can stack on a single target.

aghanim_scepter.scepter_desc: Counter Helix now applies a stacking debuff to enemies hit by it that causes them to deal less total attack damage to Axe. Counter Helix no longer has a cooldown and its counter advances when Axe attacks.

facets.name: bane_dream_stalker
facets.title: Dream Stalker
facets.description: Bane has increased attack speed when attacking Nightmared units.

facets.name: bane_sleepwalk
facets.title: Sleepwalk
facets.description: Nightmared units walk in Bane's chosen direction.

shard.shard_desc: Reduces cooldown by 3. Causes Brain Sap to become a 550 AoE spell. Secondary targets only heal for 30%.

aghanim_scepter.scepter_desc: Reduces Fiend's Grip cooldown by 45. Fiend's Grip now creates two uncontrollable illusions that are also channeling Fiend's Grip on the target. Illusions take 225% incoming damage and immediately die if they are interrupted. Damage does not stack.

facets.name: bloodseeker_arterial_spray
facets.title: Arterial Spray
facets.description: Ruptured units are pushed when attacked by Bloodseeker.

facets.name: bloodseeker_bloodrush
facets.title: Bloodrush
facets.description: Bloodseeker can supercharge the movement speed from Thirst temporarily.

facets.name: bloodseeker_old_blood
facets.title: Old Blood
facets.description: Bloodrage silences the target and can be applied to enemies. Bloodrage increases base attack damage instead of spell damage.

shard.shard_desc: Bloodseeker's Bloodrage attacks now deal 2% of the target's max health as Pure damage.

aghanim_scepter.scepter_desc: Increases initial damage and grants 2 Rupture Charges.

facets.name: crystal_maiden_frozen_expanse
facets.title: Frozen Expanse
facets.description: Freezing Field also passively increases Crystal Maiden's cast range and area of effect.

facets.name: crystal_maiden_cold_comfort
facets.title: Cold Comfort
facets.description: Crystal Maiden restores her allies' Mana when casting spells. Increases innate Mana Regen Amplification.

facets.name: crystal_maiden_glacial_guard
facets.title: Glacial Guard
facets.description: Crystal Nova has increased radius and grants allied heroes a physical damage barrier. Barrier is increased for Crystal Maiden.

facets.name: crystal_maiden_arcane_overflow
facets.title: Arcane Overflow
facets.description: Activating Arcane Aura temporarily increases Crystal Maiden's spell amplification and mana costs. During the duration, Crystal Maiden restores her and her allies' Mana when casting spells.

shard.shard_desc: Slides in a direction, creating a crystal clone of herself in her place and disjointing incoming projectiles. If the clone takes enough damage or times out, it shatters, Frostbiting enemies in a 450 AoE around its place. The Clone can also be destroyed by Crystal Maiden's own spells.

aghanim_scepter.scepter_desc: Allows you to move, cast and attack during Freezing Field. Can still be interrupted by enemies. You move 75% slower during this. Increases total number of explosions by 20%. Applies Frostbite to any unit that has been standing in the Freezing Field for over 2s.

facets.name: drow_ranger_high_ground
facets.title: Vantage Point
facets.description: Drow deals 30% more damage when attacking from high ground.

facets.name: drow_ranger_sidestep
facets.title: Sidestep
facets.description: Drow can move slowly and use items while casting Multishot.

shard.shard_desc: Drow creates a hill of ice beneath her, knocking away nearby enemies. Units on the hill gain flying vision and Drow and her ranged allies gain bonus attack range. Drow gains additional damage while on the Glacier and attacking targets below her. The front of the hill obscures vision and cannot be moved through except by Drow. Does not interrupt Multishot when cast.

aghanim_scepter.scepter_desc: Frost Arrows now apply a Hypothermia stack to enemies, increasing damage from Frost Arrows and reducing their Health Restoration per stack. If an enemy dies with Hypothermia stacks, they burst and deal damage per stack and slow in an area around it.

facets.name: earthshaker_tectonic_buildup
facets.title: Tectonic Buildup
facets.description: Aftershock radius is increased by 30 for every level of Echo Slam.

facets.name: earthshaker_slugger
facets.title: Slugger Facet
facets.description: Enemies killed with Enchant Totem or Earthshaker's other abilities are sent flying, dealing damage to enemies they hit.

facets.name: earthshaker_reverberating_ridge
facets.title: Resonating Ridge
facets.description: Enemy heroes stunned by Fissure emit an echo to each nearby unit.

shard.shard_desc: Reduces Fissure cooldown and releases an Aftershock along its path that stuns for a shortened duration when Earthshaker casts another ability.

aghanim_scepter.scepter_desc: Enchant Totem becomes a ground target ability, causing Earthshaker to jump in the air and land at the target spot, casting Enchant Totem there.  Self-casting the ability will behave in the original form, without jumping. Grants Enchant Totem a cleaving attack.

facets.name: juggernaut_bladestorm
facets.title: Bladestorm
facets.description: Blade Fury can now critically strike based on the level of Blade Dance.

facets.name: juggernaut_agigain
facets.title: Bladeform
facets.description: Juggernaut gains a stack of Bladeform every 2s that Juggernaut does not take damage. Each stack grants bonus base Agility and Movement Speed. Stacks fade after 2s upon taking any damage.

shard.shard_desc: Increases ward healing and health.

aghanim_scepter.scepter_desc: Performs a short Omnislash for 1 seconds.

facets.name: mirana_moonlight
facets.title: Moonlight Shadow Facet
facets.description: Mirana's Ultimate grants allies invisibility and movement speed.

facets.name: mirana_sunlight
facets.title: Solar Flare
facets.description: Mirana's Ultimate grants allies increasing attack speed and damage over time.

facets.name: mirana_starstruck
facets.title: Starstruck
facets.description: Starstorm's second meteor deals more damage and blinds the target.

facets.name: mirana_leaps_and_bounds
facets.title: Leaps and Bounds
facets.description: Upon landing, Leap roots targets in a 250 radius for 1.5/1.75/2.0/2.25s.

shard.shard_desc: Grants 3 temporary Charges while Leap's buff is active.

aghanim_scepter.scepter_desc: Causes Sacred Arrow to release a Starstorm on enemies along the travel path of the primary arrow, releasing a second Starstorm that deals less damage to the impacted unit.

facets.name: nevermore_lasting_presence
facets.title: Lasting Presence
facets.description: Presence of the Dark Lord temporarily reduces more armor after nearby enemy heroes are killed. Every hero kill increases Necromastery's max souls by 1 until Shadow Fiend dies.

facets.name: nevermore_shadowmire
facets.title: Shadowmire
facets.description: Shadowraze slows enemies.

shard.shard_desc: Cooldown reduced by 2s per enemy hero hit. Applies a stacking -12% movement speed debuff on enemies hit.

aghanim_scepter.scepter_desc: Reduces cooldown and causes Requiem of Souls to return back to Shadow Fiend. The wave back to Shadow Fiend heals him for all the damage it dealt.

facets.name: morphling_agi
facets.title: Ebb
facets.description: Morphling's Primary Attribute is now Agility. Waveform attacks enemies in his path.

facets.name: morphling_str
facets.title: Flow
facets.description: Morphling's Primary Attribute is now Strength. Morphling gains 1% Spell Amp per 4 Agility.

shard.shard_desc: Morphling can shift attributes while stunned. Reduces mana cost.

aghanim_scepter.scepter_desc: Adds an alt-cast to Morph. When enabled, a strong illusion is created of the target hero that can cast all of the hero's basic abilities. If the illusion is alive when Morphling toggles the ability, he will take the place of the illusion, destroying it.

facets.name: phantom_lancer_convergence
facets.title: Convergence
facets.description: Doppelganger spawns additional illusions, with the amount depending on Phantom Lancer's current health.

facets.name: phantom_lancer_divergence
facets.title: Divergence
facets.description: Juxtapose Illusions spawn on random nearby units and deal more damage but can't be controlled.

facets.name: phantom_lancer_lancelot
facets.title: Lancelot
facets.description: Spirit Lances from Phantom Lancer's illusions deal 25% Lance Damage.

facets.name: phantom_lancer_lancer
facets.title: Fractured
facets.description: This facet doesn't do anything. Azwraith is out spear fishing...

shard.shard_desc: Adds an active ability to Juxtapose. Renders Phantom Lancer invisible for up to 8 seconds while generating a duplicate image to confuse enemies. His movement speed is increased by 15% during this invisibility.

aghanim_scepter.scepter_desc: Increases Range. Whenever Phantom Lancer Rushes through enemies, he creates Juxtapose illusions that attack them. Additionally, every 600 units rushed creates a Juxtapose illusion that rushes to the target alongside Phantom Lancer.

facets.name: puck_jostling_rift
facets.title: Jostling Rift
facets.description: Waning Rift can push or pull targets.

facets.name: puck_curveball
facets.title: Curveball
facets.description: Puck's Illusory Orb can be curved in any direction, moves faster, deals more damage and lasts longer.

shard.shard_desc: Puck's attacks deal bonus magic damage. Puck attacks all enemies within its attack range every time it phase shifts.

aghanim_scepter.scepter_desc: All enemies affected by Dream Coil are attacked at a rate equal to 90% of Puck's attack rate. The attacks continue while the target is stunned if they break the Dream Coil.

facets.name: pudge_fresh_meat
facets.title: Fresh Meat
facets.description: Dismember increases Strength when dealing damage to heroes.

facets.name: pudge_flayers_hook
facets.title: Flayer's Hook
facets.description: Meat Hook deals bonus damage based on the distance pulled, but base damage is reduced.

facets.name: pudge_rotten_core
facets.title: Rotten Core
facets.description: While Rot is activated, Pudge gains bonus attack damage every second.

shard.shard_desc: When Meat Hook hits an enemy, it deals bonus damage based on the distance pulled. When Meat Hook hits an ally, Meat Hook's cooldown is reduced by 50%.

aghanim_scepter.scepter_desc: Increases Rot radius by 200, damage by 90, and causes it to reduce enemy Health Restoration by 20%.

facets.name: razor_thunderhead
facets.title: Thunderhead
facets.description: Storm Surge lightning strikes more often and hits all units within Eye of the Storm's area of effect when it is active.

facets.name: razor_spellamp
facets.title: Dynamo
facets.description: Razor gains 1.25% spell amplification for every 20 points of attack damage.

shard.shard_desc: While Eye of the Storm is active, strike chance is 2x as high, strike cooldown is reduced by 2.0s, and Lightning strikes all enemies within Eye of the Storm's radius. Does not apply to the same enemy twice from a single instance.

aghanim_scepter.scepter_desc: Causes Eye of the Storm to strike two different units instead of one and can damage structures. When striking buildings, it will only target towers, barracks, and the Ancient.

facets.name: sand_king_sandshroud
facets.title: Sandshroud
facets.description: Sand Storm has increased radius and grants Sand King Invisibility while in it.

facets.name: sand_king_dust_devil
facets.title: Dust Devil
facets.description: Sand Storm follows Sand King when he moves.

facets.name: sand_king_obscurity
facets.title: Sandblast
facets.description: When Sand King attacks enemies in Sand Storm, he applies a blinding debuff to his target.

facets.name: sand_king_pinpoint
facets.title: Final Sting
facets.description: A Caustic Finale explosion is created around every enemy hero hit in Stinger's innermost radius.

shard.shard_desc: Increases Epicenter damage per pulse. Every 3.0s causes a small single Epicenter Pulse around Sand King.

aghanim_scepter.scepter_desc: When the pulses start, 3 Stinger attack areas are created every 0.5s at random locations, each measuring 35% of the Epicenter's current radius, that apply 50% of Stinger damage to enemies hit. Shard pulses cause 1 attack(s).

facets.name: storm_spirit_shock_collar
facets.title: Shock Collar
facets.description: Electric Vortex applies a debuff that triggers an Overload Charge if they attack.

facets.name: storm_spirit_static_slide
facets.title: Static Slide
facets.description: Static Remnants spawn at Storm Spirit and move to the target position.

shard.shard_desc: Can be activated to grant Storm Spirit and nearby allied heroes 3 Overload charges. Provides bonus Attack Speed. Lasts up to 12 seconds or until the charges are depleted.

aghanim_scepter.scepter_desc: Electric Vortex affects all enemies within a radius around Storm Spirit.

facets.name: sven_heavy_plate
facets.title: Heavy Plate
facets.description: Warcry provides a physical damage barrier.

facets.name: sven_strscaling
facets.title: Wrath of God
facets.description: Sven gains additional attack damage from Strength.

shard.shard_desc: Increases radius and bonus movement speed. Warcry is now undispellable and provides a 300 physical damage barrier.

aghanim_scepter.scepter_desc: Increases cast range and applies a basic dispel on the target. Affects invulnerable units. If alt-cast, it deals an additional 180 damage and Sven travels with the Storm Hammer.

facets.name: tiny_crash_landing
facets.title: Crash Landing
facets.description: Tossed units slow and deal bonus damage to other targets at the Toss destination.

facets.name: tiny_insurmountable
facets.title: Insurmountable
facets.description: Tiny gains Status and Slow Resistance from Strength. Slow Resistance also reduces the impact of Attack Speed slows.

shard.shard_desc: Units tossed by Toss or trees tossed by Tree Throw or Tree Volley now deal additional damage and slow in a larger area of effect at their landing location.

aghanim_scepter.scepter_desc: CHANNELED - Tiny channels to throw random trees within range towards the targeted area. Deals Tiny's attack with Tree Throw bonuses.

facets.name: vengefulspirit_avenging_missile
facets.title: Avenging Missile
facets.description: Magic Missile deals 0.75 bonus damage for every creep the enemy has killed.

facets.name: vvengefulspirit_melee
facets.title: Soul Strike
facets.description: Vengeful Spirit's ranged attacks behave as if they were melee attacks.

shard.shard_desc: Bounces once on an enemy, prioritizing heroes, within 75% of Magic Missile's current cast range from the first target.

aghanim_scepter.scepter_desc: Increases self multiplier. Upon death, creates a strong illusion of Vengeful Spirit that deals full damage, and can cast all of her spells. If the illusion is alive when Vengeful Spirit respawn, she will take its place. XP earned by her illusion is given to her. Strong Illusions are not instantly killed by spells.

facets.name: windrunner_focusfire
facets.title: Focus Fire Facet
facets.description: Focus Fire rapidly attacks a single target.

facets.name: windrunner_whirlwind
facets.title: Whirlwind
facets.description: Focus Fire randomly attacks enemies within range.

facets.name: windrunner_tangled
facets.title: Tangled
facets.description: Shackleshot affects more enemies and grants damage per unit shackled.

facets.name: windrunner_killshot
facets.title: Killshot
facets.description: Powershot executes low health enemy heroes.

shard.shard_desc: Vector Targeted. Summons a strong wind that pushes all enemies in the target area towards the target direction.

aghanim_scepter.scepter_desc: Attacks grant Tailwind. Tailwind lasts longer and is undispellable.

facets.name: zuus_livewire
facets.title: Livewire
facets.description: Static Field deals more damage to nearby enemies.

facets.name: zuus_divine_rampage
facets.title: Divine Rampage
facets.description: When Thundergod's Wrath kills an enemy, it deals more damage to the other enemies.

shard.shard_desc: Zeus gains bonus attack speed and his attacks create Arc Lightnings that deal a percentage of its damage. Can be toggled off to stop this effect.

aghanim_scepter.scepter_desc: Creates a storm cloud anywhere on the map that automatically casts Lightning Bolt on nearby enemies.

facets.name: kunkka_high_tide
facets.title: High Tide
facets.description: Tidebringer cooldown is reduced per enemy hero it hits.

facets.name: kunkka_grog
facets.title: Grog Blossom
facets.description: When X Marks the Spot returns its target, Kunkka and all nearby allies gain Ghostship's Admiral's Rum buff.

shard.shard_desc: Releases a Tidal Wave that spawns behind Kunkka. Deals damage and drags enemies along it. Enemies cannot attack while being dragged.

aghanim_scepter.scepter_desc: Ghostship creates a fleet of 2 ships at the target point on a 2.5 second interval. Each ship now also fires 3 waves of cannonballs from the port and starboard side that deal 40% of Ghostship's damage as they pass through enemies.

facets.name: lina_supercharge
facets.title: Thermal Runaway
facets.description: Casting Laguna Blade temporarily supercharges Lina, granting her stacks of Fiery Soul.

facets.name: lina_dot
facets.title: Slow Burn
facets.description: Lina's spells deal extra damage over time.

shard.shard_desc: Casting Laguna Blade temporarily supercharges Lina, granting her stacks of Fiery Soul.

aghanim_scepter.scepter_desc: Grants Lina unobstructed movement and increases her spell damage and magic resistance. Grants max fiery soul stacks on activation.

facets.name: lich_frostbound
facets.title: Frostbound
facets.description: Chain Frost lingers on its last target if it fails to bounce and can bounce again if new targets become available.

facets.name: lich_growing_cold
facets.title: Growing Cold
facets.description: When an enemy is killed by Chain Frost or while under the effect of Frost Shield, the duration of these abilities is extended.

facets.name: lich_cryophobia
facets.title: Evil Eye
facets.description: Sinister Gaze applies a lingering effect to the target, causing it to take extra magic damage from Lich and amplify incoming movement slows.

shard.shard_desc: Creates an Ice Spire at the target spot, slowing enemies around it. Can take 4 hero hits or 8 creep hits and when destroyed it will create a Frost Blast around it. Chain Frost can be cast on the Spire and can bounce to the Spire and damage the spire by 1 hero attack if there are no other enemies in range. Lich can cast Frost Shield on the Spire. Each Frost Shield tick will heal the spire by 1 hero attack.

aghanim_scepter.scepter_desc: Sinister Gaze becomes an Area of Effect ability, affecting units within a radius of 400 in the target area. Sinister Gaze allows Lich to cast other abilities while channeling it.

facets.name: lion_essence_eater
facets.title: Essence Eater
facets.description: Mana Drain deals damage equal to 100% of mana stolen.

facets.name: lion_fist_of_death
facets.title: Fist of Death
facets.description: Lion gains a strong Melee cleaving attack after casting Finger of Death.

shard.shard_desc: Causes Mana Drain to affect up to 2 additional enemies and increases break distance. Lion becomes Debuff Immune with 60% magic resistance while channeling.

aghanim_scepter.scepter_desc: Finger of Death gains area of effect damage on the initial cast, and increases duration and cleave damage on its subsequent melee attacks.

facets.name: shadow_shaman_cluster_cluck
facets.title: Cluster Cluck
facets.description: Hex can turn allies into a flock of chickens, removing other negative effects.

facets.name: shadow_shaman_voodoo_hands
facets.title: Chicken Fingers
facets.description: Shadow Shaman's attacks can transform enemies into a chicken.

facets.name: shadow_shaman_massive_serpent_ward
facets.title: Massive Serpent Ward
facets.description: Summons a single massive Serpent Ward with 12x damage and 9x health and bounty values.

shard.shard_desc: Allows to create a Mega Ward using the Urnaconda ability.

aghanim_scepter.scepter_desc: Increase cast range. Every 0.9 seconds, shackled units emit a radial Ether Shock hitting all other units within 600 of the target for 100% of Ether Shock's normal damage. Shackles can now also be cast on allies and Mass Serpent Wards that stay within 2000 units of Shadow Shaman. Allied units are not disabled by Shackle.

facets.name: slardar_leg_day
facets.title: Leg Day
facets.description: Slardar has slow resistance and even more movement speed at the beginning of Guardian Sprint.

facets.name: slardar_brineguard
facets.title: Brineguard
facets.description: Corrosive Haze increases Slardar's armor by 50% of the total armor reduced.

shard.shard_desc: Slithereen Crush now applies Corrosive Haze for a short time to units affected.

aghanim_scepter.scepter_desc: Provides additional HP Regen, Armor and Status Resistance while in a puddle, trail, or river. Increases puddle/trail radius by 75% and puddle/trail duration by 5s.

facets.name: tidehunter_kraken_swell
facets.title: Kraken Swell
facets.description: Kraken Shell gains permanent Damage Block when an enemy hero dies under the effects of Anchor Smash.

facets.name: tidehunter_sizescale
facets.title: Krill Eater
facets.description: Tidehunter grows larger and gains extra bonuses per level.

shard.shard_desc: Tidehunter attaches a heavy anchor to an enemy hero. The hero is leashed while attached to the anchor. Attempting to move more than 350 units away from the anchor forces the hero to 100 move speed, dragging the anchor behind them. The anchor can be destroyed with 4 hero attacks.

aghanim_scepter.scepter_desc: Gush becomes a ground targeted wave ability that affects enemy units in a line.  Decreases cooldown.

facets.name: witch_doctor_headhunter
facets.title: Headhunter
facets.description: Paralyzing Cask deals more damage each bounce.

facets.name: witch_doctor_voodoo_festeration
facets.title: Voodoo Festeration
facets.description: Voodoo Restoration deals damage to enemies and only heals Witch Doctor.

facets.name: witch_doctor_cleft_death
facets.title: Cleft Death
facets.description: Death Ward attacks multiple targets with reduced damage.

facets.name: witch_doctor_malpractice
facets.title: Malpractice
facets.description: Enemies dying while Maledicted explode.

shard.shard_desc: Turns Witch Doctor into a Death Ward briefly with reduced attack speed. He is hidden during this time.

aghanim_scepter.scepter_desc: Death Ward attacks bounce between nearby enemies.

facets.name: riki_contract_killer
facets.title: Contract Killer
facets.description: Riki receives bonus experience for assists and kills.

facets.name: riki_exterminator
facets.title: Exterminator
facets.description: Tricks of the Trade has 4.5x Agility Bonus when attacking non-hero units. When Riki kills a non-hero unit during Tricks of the Trade, the cooldown is reduced by 0.75s.

facets.name: riki_riki
facets.title: Cutthroat
facets.description: This facet doesn't do anything. Riki is still looking to avenge the House of Tahlin...

shard.shard_desc: Enemies caught in the smoke screen have their armor reduced by 5 and cannot be targeted by their allies.

aghanim_scepter.scepter_desc: Increases Cast Range to 900. Allows you to target an allied unit, hiding inside them for the duration. While hiding in an allied unit, they have 15% bonus movement speed, and Tricks of the Trade lasts 1s longer and does an additional 2 attacks.

facets.name: enigma_gravity
facets.title: Event Horizon
facets.description: Units in a 600 radius moving away from Enigma have a 8% movespeed penalty.

facets.name: enigma_fragment
facets.title: Splitting Image
facets.description: Enigma spawns Eidolons upon receiving damage.

shard.shard_desc: Increases Malefice stun duration by 0.30s and creates an Eidolon next to the target every instance of Malefice stun. These Eidolons will not multiply further.

aghanim_scepter.scepter_desc: Black Hole deals additional damage equivalent to 4% of the unit's Max Health per second and does a non-interrupting pull towards it in a 1000 AoE. Pulls at a rate of 175.

facets.name: tinker_repair_bots
facets.title: Repair Bots
facets.description: March of the Machines applies a non-stacking heal over time when passing through allied heroes.

facets.name: tinker_translocator
facets.title: Translocator
facets.description: When a Self-Defense Matrix barrier on Tinker is fully absorbed, he blinks in a random forward direction. DISPEL TYPE: Basic Dispel

shard.shard_desc: Throws a flare towards an enemy, dealing damage, teleporting them away, rooting them and reducing their Cast and Attack Range for 2 seconds. The target is teleported further the closer they are to Tinker.

aghanim_scepter.scepter_desc: Turrets activate faster, and fire missiles 20% faster.

facets.name: sniper_ghillie_suit
facets.title: Ghillie Suit
facets.description: While Take Aim is active, Sniper's attacks do not reveal him from fog of war.

facets.name: sniper_scattershot
facets.title: Scattershot
facets.description: Shrapnel slow and damage are increased, but duration is decreased.

shard.shard_desc: Launches a grenade at the target area, dealing damage to enemies and knocking them and Sniper back. Enemies affected are disarmed and have their movement slowed after the knockback.

aghanim_scepter.scepter_desc: Causes Assassinate to fire quicker and stun the enemy target.

facets.name: necrolyte_profane_potency
facets.title: Profane Potency
facets.description: Sadist also grants Necrophos' AoE abilities and items bonus Radius per kill.

facets.name: necrolyte_rapid_decay
facets.title: Rapid Decay
facets.description: Ghost Shroud steals speed from his enemies and decreases their restorative powers.

shard.shard_desc: Necrophos turns into a large Death Pulse towards the target unit's position. Once it arrives to the location, the Death Pulse spreads towards nearby enemies and allies.

aghanim_scepter.scepter_desc: Heartstopper Aura's Health Decay is increased by 50% of Necrophos's current health regeneration.

facets.name: warlock_golem
facets.title: Champion of Gorroth
facets.description: Chaotic Offering Golems deal more burn damage based on Warlock's health and mana regeneration.

facets.name: warlock_grimoire
facets.title: Black Grimoire
facets.description: Grants Warlock the item Black Grimoire, which can be consumed to gain experience for each kill Warlock participated in. Starts with 1 charge.

shard.shard_desc: Increases the health and explosion damage of minor imps.

aghanim_scepter.scepter_desc: Calls 2 Golems.

facets.name: beastmaster_wild_hunt
facets.title: Wild Hunt
facets.description: Beastmaster attacks faster when his units are nearby.

facets.name: beastmaster_beast_mode
facets.title: Beast Mode
facets.description: Beastmaster can get a self attack speed and damage amplification boost.

shard.shard_desc: Beastmaster's attacks on enemy heroes also apply the Wild Axes debuff of its corresponding level.

aghanim_scepter.scepter_desc: Attacks from Beastmaster or a nearby unit he controls will cause him bang his drum, dealing damage to nearby units and healing Beastmaster and units under his control for a portion of the damage dealt. Every attack decreases the interval between drum hits down to a minimum of 0.5s between hits after 20 attacks. If no attacks are made, the intervals gradually increase. Using Primal Roar counts as 10 attacks.

facets.name: queenofpain_lifesteal
facets.title: Succubus Facet
facets.description: All sources of Spell Lifesteal also apply to Pure Damage. Queen of Pain gains Spell Lifesteal that increases with proximity to her enemies. Lifesteal is at its maximum when the enemy is 150 units or closer to her and at its minimum when the enemy is 800 units or further from her.

facets.name: queenofpain_selfdmg
facets.title: Masochist
facets.description: Queen of Pain has bonus Spell Amplification but a percentage of her spell damage is reflected back to her.

facets.name: queenofpain_facet_bondage
facets.title: Bondage
facets.description: Queen of Pain returns spell damage back to enemies. Succubus's Spell Lifesteal also applies to Pure & Magical reflected damage.

shard.shard_desc: Releases a sonic boom when Queen of Pain blinks, at both her starting and ending locations. Deals 125 damage in a 300 AoE and silences the target for 1.75 seconds.

aghanim_scepter.scepter_desc: Causes Shadow Strike to become a 375 AoE Spell. When Shadow Strike ends or is re-applied to an enemy Hero, the target emits a Scream of Pain, hitting any nearby enemies.

facets.name: venomancer_patient_zero
facets.title: Patient Zero
facets.description: Noxious Plague spreads again.

facets.name: venomancer_plague_carrier
facets.title: Plague Carrier
facets.description: When Venomous Gale impacts enemy heroes, 2 Plague Wards are created around them. Plague Wards also deal Septic Shock damage based on their attack damage.

shard.shard_desc: Increases cast range and projectile speed by 25%. When Venomous Gale impacts enemy heroes, 2 Plague Wards are created around them.

aghanim_scepter.scepter_desc: Decreases cooldown by 35 seconds. Infected units have decreased magic resistance. Additional spreads from hero targets deal full impact damage.

facets.name: faceless_void_chronosphere
facets.title: Chronosphere
facets.description: Faceless Void can cast Chronosphere, trapping enemies in a sphere.

facets.name: faceless_void_time_zone
facets.title: Time Zone
facets.description: Faceless Void can cast Time Zone, dramatically slowing down enemies and speeding up allies in an area.

shard.shard_desc: Increases slow per stack. Provides Faceless Void with stacks that increase his attack and movement speed. Amount of stacks is equal to the total amount of Time Dilation stacks applied to enemies at the moment of the cast and linearly fades out over the duration.

aghanim_scepter.scepter_desc: Available for 1.5 seconds after landing Time Walk. If used in this period, you will reverse your time walk back to your previous cast location. Does not affect health or proc scepter hits.

facets.name: skeleton_king_facet_bone_guard
facets.title: Bone Guard
facets.description: Wraith King can summon skeletons to fight for him.

facets.name: skeleton_king_facet_cursed_blade
facets.title: Spectral Blade
facets.description: Wraith King's attacks curse enemies, dealing additional damage after a delay.

shard.shard_desc: Mortal Strike hits curse their target, causing them to take 75% of the initial attack damage again as Pure damage after a 3 second delay. Vampiric Spirit's lifesteal applies to the curse damage.

aghanim_scepter.scepter_desc: Grants the ability to transform fallen allied heroes into ghosts. Increases the duration of the ghost form.

facets.name: death_prophet_suppress
facets.title: Suppress
facets.description: Silenced enemies are also slowed.

facets.name: death_prophet_ghosts
facets.title: Spirit Collector
facets.description: Hero deaths empower your next Exorcism.

facets.name: death_prophet_delayed_damage
facets.title: Mourning Ritual
facets.description: Death Prophet delays a percentage of incoming damage, taking the damage in even intervals over a short duration.

shard.shard_desc: Increases Spirit Siphon charges by 1 and causes enemies to be feared for 1.0 seconds if they are siphoned for 3 seconds consecutively.

aghanim_scepter.scepter_desc: Whenever an enemy is affected by Death Prophet's spells or when she attacks an enemy, a ghost will fly out and hit the enemy for an increased bonus of its usual damage then return to her with life.

facets.name: phantom_assassin_veiled_one
facets.title: Veiled One
facets.description: Blur is no longer dispelled when attacking and reduces mana costs during and after Blur.

facets.name: phantom_assassin_methodical
facets.title: Methodical
facets.description: Coup de Grace procs every [object Object] attacks on the same hero or [object Object] attacks on non hero units.

facets.name: phantom_assassin_sweet_release
facets.title: Sweet Release
facets.description: Stifling Dagger re-casts when an enemy dies.

shard.shard_desc: Decreases Cooldown. Any time Phantom Assassin gets a hero kill, her ability cooldowns advance 60% of their max cooldown values.

aghanim_scepter.scepter_desc: Phantom Assassin releases sharp blades around her, dealing a percentage of each victim's max health on impact and applying Break.

facets.name: pugna_siphoning_ward
facets.title: Siphoning Ward
facets.description: Nether Ward restores mana and health to Pugna based on how much damage is dealt.

facets.name: pugna_rewards_of_ruin
facets.title: Rewards of Ruin
facets.description: Pugna receives 1.5% spell amplification per destroyed tower.

shard.shard_desc: Life Drain can target your Nether Ward, causing life drain to refract to all enemy heroes within 700 units of the ward for 75% of its normal value. The effect is interrupted if the ward is destroyed.

aghanim_scepter.scepter_desc: Reduces cooldown by 3.5s. When targeting an enemy hero, Pugna reduces their outgoing spell damage by 8% per second up to a maximum of 75% and increases his own, up to a maximum of 100%. When draining through a Nether Ward using Shard, the rate of increase/decrease is 4% instead. Debuff lasts 8 seconds.

facets.name: templar_assassin_voidblades
facets.title: Voidblades
facets.description: Meld bonus damage and armor reductions are applied to all enemies in the Psi Blades split range.

facets.name: templar_assassin_refractor
facets.title: Refractor
facets.description: Refraction gains a damage charge every time a shield charge gets consumed.

facets.name: templar_assassin_hidden_reach
facets.title: Hidden Reach
facets.description: When in Meld, Templar increases her attack range by up to an additional 400 range over 1s.

shard.shard_desc: Increases bonus damage. Refraction can be cast while disabled.

aghanim_scepter.scepter_desc: CHANNELED - Allows Templar Assassin to teleport to any Psionic Trap after channeling for 2 seconds, detonating it upon arrival as if it was fully charged and instantly dealing 400 bonus damage. Channeling Psionic Projection does not break Meld.

facets.name: viper_poison_burst
facets.title: Poison Burst
facets.description: After Poison Attack stacks expire, enemies around the target take additional damage.

facets.name: viper_caustic_bath
facets.title: Caustic Bath
facets.description: Viper's Corrosive Skin effects are increased while he is in Nethertoxin.

shard.shard_desc: Increases max stacks, and causes Poison Attack to lower armor per stack and to affect buildings for reduced damage.

aghanim_scepter.scepter_desc: Viper slams into the ground, releasing a Nethertoxin and splattering each enemy in a 500 AoE for 4 seconds with the effect of Corrosive Skin.

facets.name: luna_moonshield
facets.title: Moonshield
facets.description: Lunar Orbit provide damage reduction while active.

facets.name: luna_moonstorm
facets.title: Moonstorm
facets.description: Hitting enemies with Lucent Beams or Eclipse grants Luna bonus attack damage.

shard.shard_desc: Increases damage reduction. While active, Luna gains 20% bonus movement speed.

aghanim_scepter.scepter_desc: Allows Luna to cast Eclipse on an allied unit or herself and have its effects follow them, or cast it on an area. Increases total beams, reduces duration, removes the limit on beams per unit, and makes the beams appear twice as fast.

facets.name: dragon_knight_fire_dragon
facets.title: Fire Dragon
facets.description: Dragon Knight deals additional Magic Damage with his attacks. Dragon Knight's abilities have increased Area of Effect that get stronger when in Elder Dragon Form.

facets.name: dragon_knight_corrosive_dragon
facets.title: Corrosive Dragon
facets.description: Dragon Knight has Corrosive Powers on his attacks that get stronger when in Elder Dragon Form. All of his abilities deal Physical damage.

facets.name: dragon_knight_frost_dragon
facets.title: Frost Dragon
facets.description: Dragon Knight has Slow and Health Restoration Reduction Effects on his attacks that get stronger when in Elder Dragon Form.

shard.shard_desc: Ignites an area, dealing damage over time that lingers on enemies in it. Has reduced cast range when melee.

aghanim_scepter.scepter_desc: Increases the current level of Dragon Form by one. Adds a Level 4 Black Dragon that has free pathing, bonus magic resistance, and increased other bonuses.

facets.name: dazzle_facet_nothl_boon
facets.title: Nothl Boon
facets.description: Dazzle's overhealing is converted into a barrier. Weave is stronger on allies and amplifies incoming heals from Dazzle.

facets.name: dazzle_poison_bloom
facets.title: Poison Bloom
facets.description: Dazzle can spread his Poison Touch when attacking enemies. Weave is stronger on enemies.

shard.shard_desc: Applying Weave to an ally heals them for 60 per stack of Weave.

aghanim_scepter.scepter_desc: Shadow Wave can now target and bounce between enemies in addition to allies. When bouncing to an enemy, they will take damage and heal nearby allies equal to 100% of the normal healing and damage values. Dazzle will also perform an attack against any enemy that Shadow Wave bounces to.

facets.name: rattletrap_hookup
facets.title: Hookup
facets.description: If there's another allied hero within 350 of Hookshot's hit target, Clockwerk and all allies in the area receive bonus armor, while refunding a portion of Hookshot's cooldown and manacost.

facets.name: rattletrap_expanded_armature
facets.title: Expanded Armature
facets.description: Power Cogs form in a larger radius.

facets.name: rattletrap_junk_mail
facets.title: Chainmeal
facets.description: Clockwerk can consume Chainmails to permanently gain +4 armor.

shard.shard_desc: Clockwerk activates a jetpack, gaining flying movement, flying vision, and bonus movement speed. Clockwerk has a severely-limited turn rate during this time and cannot attack. Jetpack can be toggled on and off for the duration of the buff.

aghanim_scepter.scepter_desc:
Supercharges Clockwerks abilities:
Battery Assault: Increased radius and affects all enemies in its range.
Power Cogs: Radius increased, and Clockwerk's armor while near Power Cogs is increased.
Rocket Flares: Increased damage, vision and slow duration, and fire additional rockets to either side of the target.
Hookshot: Stun radius and duration increased. Jetpack Moves faster. Clockwerk's movement and attack speed becomes slowed to a crawl after the duration runs out.

facets.name: leshrac_attacks_mana
facets.title: Chronoptic Nourishment
facets.description: Leshrac's attacks restore mana.

facets.name: leshrac_misanthropy
facets.title: Misanthropy
facets.description: Diabolic Edict explosion rate increased but it no longer damages buildings.

shard.shard_desc: Causes Split Earth to repeat in the same location 2 additional times, with a 5 second delay between each one. Each time the radius increases by 45. Split Earth echo location is visible to both teams.

aghanim_scepter.scepter_desc: Causes Leshrac and all nearby enemies to turn ethereal, preventing them from attacking, slowing them, and making them take more magic damage. Increases Leshrac's speed rather than reducing it. Does not cause Leshrac to take amplified damage.

facets.name: furion_soothing_saplings
facets.title: Soothing Saplings
facets.description: After Sprout is cast, all trees in a 900 radius heal nearby allies.

facets.name: furion_ironwood_treant
facets.title: Ironwood Treant
facets.description: Nature's Call creates only 1 Treant that has more health, more damage, increased vision, increased movement speed, and is Reinforced.

facets.name: furion_natures_profit
facets.title: Nature's Profit
facets.description: Whenever Nature's Prophet kills an enemy hero or one dies nearby, a money tree is created in their place that drops gold bags to be collected.

shard.shard_desc: Applies a curse on all enemy heroes within 900 range, displaying them in fog, slowing them, and dealing damage over time based on the number of trees within 250 radius. Treants count as trees for this purpose.

aghanim_scepter.scepter_desc: Entangles all enemies it hits. Duration scales from 1.5s up to 3.0s seconds at max bounce.

facets.name: life_stealer_rage
facets.title: Rage
facets.description: Lifestealer can cast Rage, becoming Debuff Immune and increasing magic resistance.

facets.name: life_stealer_rage_dispell
facets.title: Unfettered
facets.description: Lifestealer can cast Unfettered to dispel himself and become more resilient. Can cast while stunned.

facets.name: life_stealer_fleshfeast
facets.title: Fleshfeast
facets.description: Feast's max HP per hero kill is increased. Open Wounds' cooldown is refreshed if a unit dies while afflicted by Open Wounds.

facets.name: life_stealer_gorestorm
facets.title: Gorestorm
facets.description: Consuming a creep with Infest drenches enemies in blood which deals damage over time based on the host's remaining health. Infest can be used on Ancient creeps.

shard.shard_desc: Consuming a creep with Infest drenches enemies in blood which deals damage over time based on the host's remaining health.

aghanim_scepter.scepter_desc: Increases cast range and reduces cooldown to 20s. Infest may target enemy heroes for a short duration, attacking them from the inside while increasing Lifestealer's regeneration rate.

facets.name: dark_seer_atkspd
facets.title: Quick Wit
facets.description: Dark Seer also gains Attack Speed from Intelligence.

facets.name: dark_seer_movespd
facets.title: Heart of Battle
facets.description: Dark Seer moves faster when near other heroes.

shard.shard_desc: Surged units leave behind a 150 radius trail that lasts 7s, slows enemies around it by 35% and deals 40 damage per second in 0.5s intervals. Can be put on alt-cast to disable the trail.

aghanim_scepter.scepter_desc: Passive ability. Causes Dark Seer's next attack on a hero to have True Strike, knock a replica out of the victim, damaging and stunning them based on how far Dark Seer has moved in the past 3.0 seconds. Max power is reached after 1100 distance moved.

facets.name: clinkz_suppressive_fire
facets.title: Suppressive Fire
facets.description: Strafe attacks cause enemies to miss more often.

facets.name: clinkz_engulfing_step
facets.title: Engulfing Step
facets.description: Death Pact teleports Clinkz towards his victim. Reduces Death Pact cooldown.

facets.name: clinkz_clinkz
facets.title: Trial By Pyre
facets.description: This facet doesn't do anything. Clinkz is still burning with revenge...

shard.shard_desc: CHANNELED - Clinkz channels and shoots multiple piercing arrows in the target direction that hit all enemy units dealing a percentage of Clinkz' attack damage and applying attack modifiers.

aghanim_scepter.scepter_desc: Summons a row of Burning Skeleton Archers in the target location.

facets.name: omniknight_omnipresent
facets.title: Omnipresent
facets.description: Omniknight deals more damage to heroes inside his Degen Aura.

facets.name: omniknight_dmgheals
facets.title: Healing Hammer
facets.description: Ability damage done to enemies by Omniknight heals him over time.

shard.shard_desc: After a 3s delay, the target is Purified again with 65% effectiveness.

aghanim_scepter.scepter_desc: Guardian Angel has global radius, affects buildings, and amplifies health restoration.

facets.name: enchantress_overprotective_wisps
facets.title: Overprotective Wisps
facets.description: Summon Healing Wisps upon receiving damage.

facets.name: enchantress_spellbound
facets.title: Spellbound
facets.description: Enchant and attacks on Enchanted targets have extra range.

shard.shard_desc: Leaps backward, dodges incoming projectiles, and launches an Impetus attack on the 2 furthest enemy units within Enchantress' attack range + 100.

aghanim_scepter.scepter_desc: Enchantress roots an enemy unit. All creeps, ally, enemy and neutral within a radius will gain bonus movement and attack speed and attack the chosen target for 6 seconds.

facets.name: huskar_bloodbath
facets.title: Bloodbath
facets.description: Life Break also slows enemies in a radius around the target.

facets.name: huskar_nothl_transfusion
facets.title: Nothl Transfusion
facets.description: Life Break also heals friendly units in a radius around the target.

facets.name: huskar_cauterize
facets.title: Cauterize
facets.description: Berserker's Blood can be activated for a health cost. Dispels Huskar, then after a delay, heals for the amount of health consumed plus an additional bonus per debuff dispelled.

facets.name: huskar_nothl_conflagration
facets.title: Incendiary
facets.description: Burning Spears also burns enemies for a percentage of their max health. Costs Max Health instead of Current Health.

shard.shard_desc: Huskar can activate Berserker's Blood for a health cost to cauterize himself. Dispels Huskar, then after a delay, heals for the amount of health consumed plus an additional bonus per debuff dispelled. DISPEL TYPE: Basic Dispel

aghanim_scepter.scepter_desc: Forces the enemy target to attack Huskar and increases cast range.

facets.name: night_stalker_blinding_void
facets.title: Blinding Void
facets.description: Enemies affected by Void do not share vision with their allies. Affected enemies take damage per second when they are not visible to their allies.

facets.name: night_stalker_dayswap
facets.title: Night Reign
facets.description: The game now starts at night instead of day. Night is longer than day. Night Stalker starts with a bonus level of Hunter in the Night.

facets.name: night_stalker_voidbringer
facets.title: Voidbringer
facets.description: Increases the max level of Void. Level 5 Void at night becomes ground targeted and applies to an area.

shard.shard_desc: Void now affects all units in a radius around the target

aghanim_scepter.scepter_desc: Increases bonus movement speed and attack speed. Killing an enemy hero resets all basic ability cooldowns.

facets.name: broodmother_necrotic_webs
facets.title: Necrotic Webs
facets.description: Reduces health restoration of enemies on webs.

facets.name: broodmother_feeding_frenzy
facets.title: Feeding Frenzy
facets.description: Insatiable Hunger also applies to nearby Spiderlings.

shard.shard_desc: While Hunger is active, the bonus damage is increased by 4% every 1s.

aghanim_scepter.scepter_desc: Broodmother may create up to 5 invisible web lines touching any existing web. Enemy Heroes that cross the web line will spring the trap, becoming rooted, revealed in fog, and take damage over time.  Multiple Heroes can trip on the same line until it's destroyed after being initially triggered.  Broodmother's team is alerted via the minimap when an enemy has triggered the snare.

facets.name: bounty_hunter_shuriken
facets.title: Through and Through
facets.description: Shuriken Toss applies its damage and slow to all enemies it passes through.

facets.name: bounty_hunter_mugging
facets.title: Cutpurse
facets.description: Bounty Hunter steals gold when targeting enemy heroes with his abilities or items.

shard.shard_desc: Applies Shadow Walk and all of its bonuses to the target ally. Allied fade time is 0.5s. Does not break Bounty Hunter's invisibility when cast.

aghanim_scepter.scepter_desc: Increases cast range and applies Jinada on hit.

facets.name: weaver_skitterstep
facets.title: Skitterstep
facets.description: Shukuchi movespeed increased and slows enemies when passing through them.

facets.name: weaver_hivemind
facets.title: Hivemind
facets.description: Weaver gains experience when The Swarm beetles attack heroes.

shard.shard_desc: Shukuchi puts a mark on enemies it damages that last 4.6 seconds. 0.2s after Weaver exits Shukuchi, enemies with a mark within 1200 range will also be attacked with a secondary Geminate attack

aghanim_scepter.scepter_desc: Time Lapse may target allied Heroes with 500 cast range.

facets.name: jakiro_fire
facets.title: Liquid Fire Facet
facets.description: Jakiro can imbue his attacks with Attack Speed Slow and Damage over Time in an AoE.

facets.name: jakiro_ice
facets.title: Liquid Frost Facet
facets.description: Jakiro can imbue his attacks with Movement Speed Slow and a debuff that amplifies damage from his other spells.

facets.name: jakiro_twin_terror
facets.title: Twin Terror
facets.description: Jakiro deals more damage with his double attacks.

facets.name: jakiro_ice_breaker
facets.title: Ice Breaker
facets.description: Ice Path lasts longer and detonates upon expiration, dealing damage and stunning enemies a second time. Ice Path can be manually detonated early.

shard.shard_desc: Jakiro's Liquid Frost has no mana cost and no longer shares a cooldown with Liquid Fire.

aghanim_scepter.scepter_desc: Increases Macropyre duration and causes it to deal Pure damage. Jakiro emits two walls of ice along the edges of the Macropyre that slow any enemies trying to cross them by 60%.

facets.name: batrider_buff_on_displacement
facets.title: Stoked
facets.description: Firefly also lights Batrider on fire. He gains increasingly more Move Speed and Spell Amplification and burns away a portion of his max health each second.

facets.name: batrider_arsonist
facets.title: Arsonist
facets.description: Increases the max level of Sticky Napalm. Level 5 Sticky Napalm causes every attack to apply 1 stack of Sticky Napalm.

shard.shard_desc: Sticky Napalm no longer has a stack limit. Sticky Napalm deals damage to structures.

aghanim_scepter.scepter_desc: Flaming Lasso grabs both its target, as well as the target's nearest allied hero within 650 units. The secondary target is tethered to the first.

facets.name: chen_centaur_convert
facets.title: Centaur Convert
facets.description: Summon Convert calls forth either a Centaur Courser or Centaur Conqueror.

facets.name: chen_wolf_convert
facets.title: Wolf Convert
facets.description: Summon Convert calls forth either a Giant Wolf or Alpha Wolf.

facets.name: chen_hellbear_convert
facets.title: Hellbear Convert
facets.description: Summon Convert calls forth either a Hellbear or Hellbear Smasher.

facets.name: chen_troll_convert
facets.title: Troll Convert
facets.description: Summon Convert calls forth either a Hill Troll or Dark Troll Summoner.

facets.name: chen_satyr_convert
facets.title: Satyr Convert
facets.description: Summon Convert calls forth either a Satyr Mindstealer or Satyr Tormenter.

facets.name: chen_frog_convert
facets.title: Marshmage Convert
facets.description: Summon Convert calls forth either a Marshmage Apprentice or a Marshmage.

shard.shard_desc: Allows Holy Persuasion to target Ancient creeps. Can control up to 1/2/3 Ancient creeps based on Hand of God's level. Additionally levels up some abilities of creeps by 1 level.

aghanim_scepter.scepter_desc: Decreases the cooldown of Hand of God to 110s and it becomes a channelled spell that lasts for up to 6 seconds. The initial heal happens at the start of the channel, and while channeling other nearby allied units become debuff immune with 60% incoming magic damage reduction and the power of the heal over time is increased by 200%.

facets.name: spectre_forsaken
facets.title: Forsaken
facets.description: Spectre deals 2x damage with Desolate. Spectre's illusions no longer have Desolate.

facets.name: spectre_twist_the_knife
facets.title: Twist the Knife
facets.description: Reality also casts Spectral Dagger on the Haunt illusion's target.

facets.name: spectre_spectre
facets.title: Ephemeral
facets.description: This facet doesn't do anything. Spectre is still transcending between Planes...

shard.shard_desc: Dispersion can be activated to increase the amount absorbed and reflected by Dispersion by 50% of its base values for 5s. Cooldown 25. Manacost 50.

aghanim_scepter.scepter_desc: The first time Spectre uses Reality on a Haunt illusion, enemies in a 400 area around the target are Feared away from Spectre for 1.5s and have their movement speed slowed by 50%. Reduces cooldown by 20s.

facets.name: doom_bringer_gluttony
facets.title: Gluttony
facets.description: Devour now has 2 charges and stolen creep abilities are upgraded by one level.

facets.name: doom_bringer_boost_selling
facets.title: Devil's Bargain
facets.description: Doom can sell items for 85% of their value, but his buyback costs are increased by 20%.

facets.name: doom_bringer_impending_doom
facets.title: Impending Doom
facets.description: Every 6.66 minutes, Doom's duration is increased by 0.66s.

shard.shard_desc: Devour has 2 charges and can target Ancients. Stolen creep abilities have 20% increased AoE and 40% increased spell amplification.

aghanim_scepter.scepter_desc: Doom applies Break to enemies. Allies in a 350 radius around the doomed target also suffer the effects of Doom. Allows Doom to be self-cast to affect enemies around himself with Doom.

facets.name: ancient_apparition_bone_chill
facets.title: Bone Chill
facets.description: Ancient Apparition's abilities reduce the enemy's Strength.

facets.name: ancient_apparition_exposure
facets.title: Exposure
facets.description: Cold Feet applies in an AoE, depending on the current level of Ice Blast.

shard.shard_desc: Freezes enemies hit with the current level of Cold Feet for 50% of the duration.

aghanim_scepter.scepter_desc: Increases Base Strength Reduction.

facets.name: ursa_grudge_bearer
facets.title: Grudge Bearer
facets.description: When damaged during Enrage, Ursa gains bonus attack damage.

facets.name: ursa_debuff_reduce
facets.title: Bear Down
facets.description: Debuffs inflicted by Ursa last longer.

shard.shard_desc: Earthshock applies 3 Fury Swipes to enemies hit.

aghanim_scepter.scepter_desc: Reduces cooldown and allows Ursa to use Enrage while disabled.

facets.name: spirit_breaker_bull_rush
facets.title: Bull Rush
facets.description: Charge of Darkness bonus movement speed lingers after charge ends.

facets.name: spirit_breaker_imbalanced
facets.title: Imbalanced
facets.description: Enemy targets hit by Nether Strike will be moved further by allied forced movement effects.

facets.name: spirit_breaker_bulls_hit
facets.title: Bull's Hit
facets.description: Greater Bash chance is increased if you've bashed more than one hero recently.

shard.shard_desc: Barathrum gains magic resistance and distorts reality around the selected hero, making any unit-targeted spells cast by enemy heroes get redirected towards Spirit Breaker. Can be cast on both allied and enemy heroes, but only spells cast by enemies of Spirit Breaker will be redirected.

aghanim_scepter.scepter_desc: Increases knockback. If a knocked-back enemy collides with another enemy, the second enemy is bashed (creeps only receive 25% damage), and the original target takes 25% of Greater Bash's damage again.

facets.name: gyrocopter_secondary_strikes
facets.title: Secondary Strikes
facets.description: Call Down creates delayed secondary explosions around heroes it hits.

facets.name: gyrocopter_afterburner
facets.title: Afterburner
facets.description: Every successful hit of a Rocket Barrage rocket on an enemy hero increases Gyrocopter's movement speed.

shard.shard_desc: Homing Missiles now constantly fires the current level of Rocket Barrage in a 700 area of effect after 1.0 second of being cast. This Rocket Barrage prioritizes the Homing Missile target.

aghanim_scepter.scepter_desc: Gyrocopter gains a Side Gunner that attacks enemy units in a 700 unit radius every 1.3s with his attack. Side Gunner will attack 2 units at a time while Flak Cannon is active. Prioritizes furthest unit away within its range.

facets.name: alchemist_seed_money
facets.title: Seed Money
facets.description: Alchemist starts with 250 more gold.

facets.name: alchemist_mixologist
facets.title: Mixologist
facets.description: Unstable Concoction and Berserk Potion recharge faster when in Chemical Rage.

facets.name: alchemist_dividends
facets.title: Dividends
facets.description: Alchemist gains +70 GPM for each Aghanim's Scepter he has granted to allies.

shard.shard_desc: Alchemist throws a potion at an ally, applying a basic dispel and giving them attack speed, movement speed and HP regen. DISPEL TYPE: Basic Dispel

aghanim_scepter.scepter_desc: Alchemist melts down Aghanim's Scepter to grant an allied hero all Aghanim's Scepter upgrades. Alchemist will gain bonus damage and 6 additional base and max Greevil's Greed Extra Gold for each melted Scepter.

facets.name: invoker_quas_focus
facets.title: Scholar of Koryx
facets.description: Quas gains an additional max level. When Invoker reaches level 6, Quas gains an additional level. Aghanim's Scepter upgrades Ice Wall. Aghanim's Shard upgrades Ghost Walk.

facets.name: invoker_wex_focus
facets.title: Mind of Tornarus
facets.description: Wex gains an additional max level. When Invoker reaches level 6, Wex gains an additional level. Aghanim's Scepter upgrades Tornado. Aghanim's Shard upgrades E.M.P.

facets.name: invoker_exort_focus
facets.title: Agent of Gallaron
facets.description: Exort gains an additional max level. When Invoker reaches level 6, Exort gains an additional level. Aghanim's Scepter upgrades Sun Strike. Aghanim's Shard upgrades Sun Strike.

shard.shard_desc:
Variant 1 - Ghost Walk: Adds periodic damage from Ice Wall and increases cast range.
Variant 2 - E.M.P.: Increases damage per mana burned by this ability and pulls enemies to the center at 125 units per second.
Variant 3 - Sun Strike: When Sun Strike hits an enemy hero, a Forge Spirit of current level is created near them.

aghanim_scepter.scepter_desc:
Variant 1 - Quas: Increases current and maximum level of the ability by 1.
Ice Wall: Adds vector targeting. After a delay, creates an ice flow 150 width that freezes enemy heroes who stay in it for 2.5 sec, causing them to become rooted and take magic damage based on Quas level.
Variant 2 - Wex: Increases current and maximum level of the ability by 1.
Tornado: Creates vortices along its path. Vortices persist for some time after the main tornado ends (based on Quas level) and deal damage every 0.25 sec to enemies in 150 radius based on Wex level. Damage to creeps is halved.
Variant 3 - Exort: Increases current and maximum level of the ability by 1.
Sun Strike: Grants «Cataclysm»: Double-tapping Sun Strike creates 2 visible beams in 90-180 radius from each enemy hero, dealing 75% damage. Cooldown: 90 sec.

facets.name: silencer_irrepressible
facets.title: Irrepressible
facets.description: Silencer cannot be silenced.

facets.name: silencer_reverberating_silence
facets.title: Reverberating Silence
facets.description: The first time Global Silence ends on a unit it is applied again.

facets.name: silencer_spread_the_knowledge
facets.title: Synaptic Split
facets.description: Increases the max level of Glaives of Wisdom. Level 5 Glaives of Wisdom bounce 1 time to a random target within 450 range.

facets.name: silencer_oppressive_silence
facets.title: Suffer In Silence
facets.description: Silencer takes less damage from and deals more damage to silenced targets.

shard.shard_desc:
Glaives bounce 1 time to a random enemy within a 450 radius. Increases Intelligence Steal.
 Intelligence steal: 3 / 4 / 5 / 6

aghanim_scepter.scepter_desc: Global Silence applies Arcane Curse to heroes for the duration of Global Silence.

facets.name: obsidian_destroyer_obsidian_decimator
facets.title: Obsidian Decimator
facets.description: When Essence Flux restores mana, it also temporarily increases maximum mana.

facets.name: obsidian_destroyer_overwhelming_devourer
facets.title: Overwhelming Devourer
facets.description: Heroes affected by Astral Imprisonment and Sanity's Eclipse heal Outworld Destroyer every time they cast a spell.

shard.shard_desc: Astral Imprisonment now deals damage in an area. Also allows allies to move at 70% movement speed during Astral Imprisonment (they are visible, but untargettable and can't perform any other actions).

aghanim_scepter.scepter_desc: Increases max mana to barrier. Damage that would bring Outworld Destroyer below 20% health is prevented. When that happens, Outworld Destroyer receives a strong dispel and gains an undispellable instance of Objurgation. This effect cannot occur more than once every 80 seconds.

facets.name: lycan_pack_leader
facets.title: Pack Leader
facets.description: Enemy heroes killed by Lycan or his units extend Shapeshift duration.

facets.name: lycan_spirit_wolves
facets.title: Spirit Wolves
facets.description: Summon Wolves creates invulnerable non-attacking wolves that buff Lycan's health and attack damage.

facets.name: lycan_alpha_wolves
facets.title: Alpha Wolves
facets.description: Increases the max level of Summon Wolves while lowering the max level of Howl and Feral Impulse.

shard.shard_desc: Increases the number of wolves summoned. Grants all summoned wolves the ability Hightail, an active ability that gives them phased movement, evasion, movespeed, and attack speed.

aghanim_scepter.scepter_desc: Lycan bites an allied hero or creep-hero, granting them Shapeshift properties. Lycan and the bitten target gain 40% Lifesteal and share the healing effect of Lifesteal with each other as long as they are within 1200 range of each other.

facets.name: brewmaster_roll_out_the_barrel
facets.title: Roll Out the Barrel
facets.description: Throw a barrel at enemies, damaging them and applying Cinder Brew.

facets.name: brewmaster_drunken_master
facets.title: Drunken Master
facets.description: When brewed up, Brewmaster moves with a varying amount of movement speed, altering between {s:bonus_min_movement}% slower and {s:bonus_max_movement}% faster for the duration.

facets.name: brewmaster_brewmaster
facets.title: Hungover
facets.description: This facet doesn't do anything. Brewmaster is still recovering from a drunken stupor...

shard.shard_desc: Toss a strong drink to a teammate or drink it yourself, activating the maximum power effect of Liquid Courage and granting 2.5% Max HP Regen per second. Lasts 5 seconds.

aghanim_scepter.scepter_desc: Primal Split gains 1 max and current level, improving the Brewlings and their abilities. Allows Primal Split to be cancelled early, and causes the Brewlings to be Brewed Up when Primal Split begins.

facets.name: shadow_demon_promulgate
facets.title: Promulgate
facets.description: Disseminate instantly removes a percentage of the opponent's health for its duration.

facets.name: shadow_demon_facet_soul_mastery
facets.title: Shadow Servant
facets.description: Shadow Demon creates illusions of heroes that die near him.

shard.shard_desc: Cleanses the target allied unit, removing negative buffs for the duration.  At the end of the duration, the unit is healed. Units under the effect of Disruption can still be affected by Demonic Cleanse. DISPEL TYPE: Basic Dispel

aghanim_scepter.scepter_desc: Causes Demonic Purge to break and gain 2 charges.

facets.name: lone_druid_bear_with_me
facets.title: Bear with Me
facets.description: Spirit Link's Shared Armor is increased and Lone Druid's attacks heal the Spirit Bear.

facets.name: lone_druid_unbearable
facets.title: Unbearable
facets.description: True Form transforms the Spirit Bear instead of Lone Druid. Increases the distance from Lone Druid at which the Spirit Bear can attack.

facets.name: lone_druid_bear_necessities
facets.title: Bear Necessities
facets.description: Lone Druid's items are more powerful and his inventory is smaller.

facets.name: lone_druid_lone_druid
facets.title: Forbearance
facets.description: This facet doesn't do anything. Lone Druid is still attuning to nature...

shard.shard_desc: Applies a basic dispel and grants allies in an area around the caster bonus movement and attack speed. Replicates between Lone Druid and Spirit Bear regardless of castability on the other. DISPEL TYPE: Basic Dispel

aghanim_scepter.scepter_desc: Entangle applies 5 stacks to enemy heroes in the area and has increased radius. Enemies no longer have protection from gaining stacks while Entangled.

facets.name: chaos_knight_strong_illusions
facets.title: Phantasmagoria
facets.description: All Chaos Knight Illusions are Strong Illusions and take less damage when near him.

facets.name: chaos_knight_irrationality
facets.title: Irrationality
facets.description: Reality Rift has equal chances of applying Break, Disarm, or Silence for 50% of the base debuff duration in addition to its normal effects.

facets.name: chaos_knight_facet_fundamental_forging
facets.title: Fundamental Forging
facets.description: Chaos Knight can craft artifacts from the next tier when making a Neutral Item.

facets.name: chaos_knight_cloven_chaos
facets.title: Cloven Chaos
facets.description: Chaos Bolt splits in half upon striking its target, stunning one additional enemy and damaging another.

shard.shard_desc: Causes Chaos Bolt to create a Phantasm illusion to attack the target. This illusion deals 15% less damage.

aghanim_scepter.scepter_desc: Gains a passive component. When an illusion of Chaos Knight is created, there is a 50% chance to create an additional illusion under Chaos Knight's control. When Phantasm is activated, also creates an illusion of allied heroes globally.

facets.name: meepo_more_meepo
facets.title: More Meepo
facets.description: Obtain extra Meepos sooner and get 1 extra Meepo.

facets.name: meepo_codependent
facets.title: Codependent
facets.description: Meepos increase other Meepos' attack speed and armor.

facets.name: meepo_pack_rat
facets.title: Pack Rat
facets.description: All Meepos can use the item in the neutral item slot.

shard.shard_desc: Digs into the ground for a short duration, dispelling Meepo and causing him to become invulnerable and untargetable for 3s. Restores 25% of his max health over that duration. DISPEL TYPE: Basic Dispel

aghanim_scepter.scepter_desc: In MegaMeepo form, Meepo flings the topmost meepo towards a target within a %AbilityCastRange% range, dealing damage and slowing their movement speed.

facets.name: treant_primeval_power
facets.title: Primeval Power
facets.description: Treant gains +{s:attack_damage_per_level} base attack damage per hero level.

facets.name: treant_sapling
facets.title: Sapling
facets.description: Leech Seed can be ground targeted to plant a tree.

facets.name: treant_treant
facets.title: Uprooted
facets.description: This facet doesn't do anything. Treant Protector is still finding his roots...

shard.shard_desc: Treant Protector enchants a tree, which grants him unobstructed vision in that location. The eyes last for 360 seconds and are invisible, but are destroyed if their host tree is destroyed or if they are attacked directly.

aghanim_scepter.scepter_desc: Decreases Cooldown to 85 seconds. When casting Overgrowth, Treant Protector draws power from the soil, greatly increasing his size for 16 seconds. While enlarged, he gains phased movement with a fixed speed of 345, 100% bonus Strength, and a splashing attack that deals 60% of his attack damage in a 300 unit radius.

facets.name: ogre_magi_fat_chance
facets.title: Fat Chance
facets.description: Each point of Ogre Magi's Strength adds 0.06% to Ogre Magi's Multicast chance.

facets.name: ogre_magi_learning_curve
facets.title: Learning Curve
facets.description: Level requirement of all spells and talents reduced by 1. You get 0 Ability Points at level one and 3 Ability Points at level two.

shard.shard_desc: Creates a shield around the target ally, absorbing a percentage of the damage of next 3 attacks from enemy heroes. When damage is absorbed, a fireball is launched at the attacker. Can be cast on towers.

aghanim_scepter.scepter_desc: Blasts an enemy unit with a wave of fire, dealing 150 + 1.5x Ogre's Strength in damage and stunning the target. Its mana cost is 35% of Ogre Magi's current mana.

facets.name: undying_rotting_mitts
facets.title: Rotting Mitts
facets.description: While transformed into a Flesh Golem, attacks spawn a zombie.

facets.name: undying_ripped
facets.title: Ripped
facets.description: Casting Soul Rip on allies increases their Strength by a percentage of Undying's Strength.

shard.shard_desc: Tombstone can be cast on an allied hero to bunker inside of the tombstone. Heroes that enter the Tombstone cannot leave for 2 seconds nor can they re-enter after leaving. If the tombstone is destroyed with a hero inside, that hero gets stunned for 2 seconds.

aghanim_scepter.scepter_desc: Increases strength steal.

facets.name: rubick_frugal_filch
facets.title: Frugal Filch
facets.description: Stolen spells also have lower mana cost.

facets.name: rubick_arcane_accumulation
facets.title: Arcane Accumulation
facets.description: Casting a spell temporarily increases the area of effect for all subsequent spells.

shard.shard_desc: Allows you to target yourself or allies with Telekinesis. Throw distance is increased to 600 and throw delay is reduced to 0.5 seconds.

aghanim_scepter.scepter_desc: Increases the number of spells that can be stolen to 2. Increases cast range, and upgrades spells to their Scepter version.

facets.name: disruptor_thunderstorm
facets.title: Thunderstorm
facets.description: Thunder Strike additionally hits all enemies within Kinetic Field. Thunder Strike Slow duration is increased.

facets.name: disruptor_line_walls
facets.title: Kinetic Fence
facets.description: Replaces Kinetic Field with the ability to create impassable walls.

facets.name: disruptor_conduit
facets.title: Transference
facets.description: Electromagnetic Repulsion can be activated manually, be cast on allies and deals damage equal to a percentage of Disruptor's current health.

shard.shard_desc: After a short formation time, creates a wall out of kinetic energy that enemies cannot pass.

aghanim_scepter.scepter_desc: Mutes items.

facets.name: nyx_assassin_burn_mana
facets.title: Mana Burn
facets.description: Mind Flare burns a percentage of the target's max mana.

facets.name: nyx_assassin_scuttle
facets.title: Scuttle
facets.description: For the first 15s of Vendetta, Nyx Assassin is hasted and has unobstructed pathing.

shard.shard_desc: Decreases cooldown by 10s. For the first 15s of Vendetta, Nyx is hasted and has unobstructed pathing.

aghanim_scepter.scepter_desc: Nyx Assassin buries himself beneath the battlefield over a short duration. Once burrowed, Spiked Carapace instantly stuns nearby enemies when cast, the range of Mind Flare and Impale is increased, and Impale's cooldown is decreased. While burrowed, Nyx Assassin is stationary, unable to attack, and invisible. Nyx Assassin gains damage reduction from all damage sources.

facets.name: naga_siren_passive_riptide
facets.title: Rip Tide
facets.description: Every 6 attacks from Naga and her illusions, enemies around them are damaged and their Armor is reduced.

facets.name: naga_siren_active_riptide
facets.title: Deluge
facets.description: Naga Siren can create a splash around herself and her illusions, damaging enemies and capping their max movement speed.

shard.shard_desc: Allies in range of Song of the Siren recover a percentage of their health and mana per second.

aghanim_scepter.scepter_desc: Increases cast range and projectile speed.  Allows Ensnare to target and affect Debuff Immune units. Ensnare applies Break.

facets.name: keeper_of_the_light_facet_solar_bind
facets.title: Solar Bind
facets.description: Grants the Solar Bind ability while active.

facets.name: keeper_of_the_light_facet_recall
facets.title: Recall
facets.description: After a short delay, teleports the targeted friendly hero to your location. If the targeted friendly hero takes player based damage during this time, the ability is interrupted. When cast, the teleport target's movement speed is increased. Upon teleporting, the increased movement speed buff are applied to both Keeper of the Light and the teleport target, and the latter also receives a Chakra Magic.  If alt-cast, teleports Keeper of the Light to the target Ally instead.   Ability Level increases with levels of Spirit Form.

shard.shard_desc: Increases illuminate heal.

aghanim_scepter.scepter_desc: Summons Ignis Fatuus at the targeted area. Alternates on and off, drawing enemies closer with its mesmerising flicker.

facets.name: wisp_kritzkrieg
facets.title: Kritzkrieg
facets.description: Overcharge grants attack speed and spell amplification to Io and any Tethered allies.

facets.name: wisp_medigun
facets.title: Medigun
facets.description: Overcharge grants armor and magic resistance to Io and any Tethered allies.

shard.shard_desc: Tether damages enemies touching it. Io is healed for 50% of the damage done.

aghanim_scepter.scepter_desc: Spirits now passively spawn around Io constantly every second up to the max. Spirits colliding with enemy Heroes slows them briefly. Can be activated to explode spirits.

facets.name: visage_sepulchre
facets.title: Sepulchre
facets.description: Grave Chill also affects units around the target. Visage can also recall his familiars.

facets.name: visage_faithful_followers
facets.title: Faithful Followers
facets.description: Familiars automatically move with Visage and attack his targets.

facets.name: visage_gold_assumption
facets.title: Death Toll
facets.description: Soul Assumption kills give bonus gold. Visage can also recall his familiars.

shard.shard_desc: Gains an active component, allowing Visage to use Stone Form, stunning enemies for 0.8 / 1.0 / 1.2 seconds in an 375 area around it, dealing 60 / 100 / 140 damage and becoming invulnerable for 6 seconds.  Restores up to 25% of your health.

aghanim_scepter.scepter_desc: Increases movement speed, damage, and duration. Turns Visage and familiars invisible for the duration until the flying movement is lost.

facets.name: slark_leeching_leash
facets.title: Leeching Leash
facets.description: Pounce applies stacks of Essence Shift when striking enemy heroes.

facets.name: slark_dark_reef_renegade
facets.title: Dark Reef Renegade
facets.description: Barracuda lingers after being revealed to the enemy if Slark is not nearby allied heroes. Slark's attacks reduce the target's armor while Slark is under the effects of Barracuda.

facets.name: slark_slark
facets.title: Fugitive
facets.description: This facet doesn't do anything. Slark is still reeling from nightmares about Dark Reef...

shard.shard_desc: Creates a cloud at the target location. All allies inside the radius are hidden and affected by Shadow Dance.

aghanim_scepter.scepter_desc: Provides charges and increases range.

facets.name: medusa_engorged
facets.title: Engorged
facets.description: Mystic Snake grants Medusa attack damage.

facets.name: medusa_mana_pact
facets.title: Mana Pact
facets.description: Medusa can gain attack speed at the cost of mana over time.

facets.name: medusa_slow_attacks
facets.title: Venomous Volley
facets.description: Every 6 attacks, Medusa applies poison to her arrow that briefly reduces movement speed and attack speed.

facets.name: medusa_undulation
facets.title: Undulation
facets.description: Medusa's movement speed is fixed at 310 (465 during Stone Gaze). Medusa is unslowable and does not benefit from movement speed increases.

shard.shard_desc: When Medusa is targeted with a spell, a single-target Mystic Snake is sent back towards the enemy that turns them into stone for 1s.

aghanim_scepter.scepter_desc: Allows on-hit effects to apply to the secondary attacks from Split Shot. Increases arrow count.

facets.name: troll_warlord_insensitive
facets.title: Insensitive
facets.description: Fervor grants armor per stack while in melee form.

facets.name: troll_warlord_bad_influence
facets.title: Bad Influence
facets.description: During Battle Trance, Troll Warlord has increased max Fervor stacks and no attack speed limit. Battle Trance grants allied heroes 50% of the attack speed bonus.

shard.shard_desc: Grants Troll 16% + 3% chance per Fervor stack of firing an additional ranged attack to any unit within its ranged attack range plus 175 when attacking an enemy unit.

aghanim_scepter.scepter_desc: Causes Whirling Axes (Melee) to dispel Troll Warlord. Reduces cooldown and mana cost. DISPEL TYPE: Basic Dispel

facets.name: centaur_counter_strike
facets.title: Counter-Strike
facets.description: Double Edge damage is increased when Centaur is damage by enemies.

facets.name: centaur_horsepower
facets.title: Horsepower
facets.description: Centaur Warrunner gains Movement Speed based on his Strength.

shard.shard_desc: Causes Double Edge to slow enemy heroes and increase Centaur's strength per hero hit for a short time. Duration refreshes per stack, up to a max of 5 stacks.

aghanim_scepter.scepter_desc: Centaur hitches a cart behind him. While active, Centaur gains the benefit of Stampede for the current level of Stampede, and can cast Hitch a Ride on a target ally.

facets.name: magnataur_reverse_polarity
facets.title: Reverse Polarity
facets.description: Reverse Polarity pulls all nearby enemies in.

facets.name: magnataur_eternal_empowerment
facets.title: Eternal Empowerment
facets.description: Empower is always on Magnus. Each subsequent attack increases its power.

facets.name: magnataur_diminishing_return
facets.title: Diminishing Return
facets.description: Increases the max level of Shockwave. Level 5 Shockwave causes it to return towards Magnus's location.

facets.name: magnataur_reverse_reverse_polarity
facets.title: Reverse Reverse Polarity
facets.description: Reverse Polarity pushes enemies away all around Magnus.

shard.shard_desc: Increases range and deals additional damage when skewering enemies into trees or cliffs.

aghanim_scepter.scepter_desc: Magnus tosses any enemies in front of him, launching them to his rear. Enemies take damage, spend 0.6 seconds in the air, and are stunned while in the air and an additional amount of time after landing.

facets.name: shredder_shredder
facets.title: Shredder
facets.description: Timber Chain splinters the tree into all directions around Timbersaw.

facets.name: shredder_second_chakram
facets.title: Twisted Chakram
facets.description: Launches a second independent Chakram that follows a curved path and returns to Timbersaw, damaging and slowing enemies it passes through. Enemies caught in the saw blade will move more slowly for every 5% of health missing.

shard.shard_desc: Releases a flame in the direction Timbersaw is facing. Applies a debuff that deals damage per second and slows enemy movement speed. Affects buildings for reduced damage.

aghanim_scepter.scepter_desc: Reactive Armor can now be activated to get max stacks and 150 damage barrier. Grants Timbersaw 100 + 75 barrier amount per second for each enemy hero within 450 radius of Timbersaw up to a maximum of 800. After 8 seconds, Timbersaw deals damage to every hero within 450 radius equal to 200 + his remaining barrier amount and loses all of his barrier.

facets.name: bristleback_berserk
facets.title: Berserk
