facets.description: Warpath grants scaling Attack Speed instead of Damage.

facets.name: bristleback_snot_rocket
facets.title: Snot Rocket
facets.description: Bristleback now fires Viscous Nasal Goo instead of Quills when damaged. Viscous Nasal Goo effects are stronger.

facets.name: bristleback_seeing_red
facets.title: Seeing Red
facets.description: Warpath can be activated to gain extra bonuses. While Seeing Red, Bristleback's vision is limited and he does not receive vision from his allies.

shard.shard_desc: Coughs a quill-packed hairball towards the target location. Erupts at the location, hitting enemies with Viscous Nasal Goo stacks and Quill Spray.

aghanim_scepter.scepter_desc: Adds active ability to Bristleback. Bristleback rotates towards the targeted direction and, after 0.5s, forcefully ejects 5 sequential Quill Sprays in a tight conical pattern out of his back every 0.4s. Bristleback's facing is locked during this time, he is disarmed, and his speed is reduced by -40%.

facets.name: tusk_facet_tag_team
facets.title: Tag Team
facets.description: Tusk can cast Tag Team causing nearby enemies to receive bonus damage from attacks.

facets.name: tusk_facet_fist_bump
facets.title: Drinking Buddies
facets.description: Tusk can cast Drinking Buddies, pulling him and a teammate closer and granting both bonus Movement Speed and Attack Damage.

shard.shard_desc: Tusk reaches out to tag an allied unit, pulling them closer. Once tagged, both Tusk and his tagged ally gain movement speed and armor. Can be put on alt-cast to only pull Tusk towards his ally with 50% reduced cast range.

aghanim_scepter.scepter_desc: Kicks the closest enemy unit in the drawn direction, stunning, damaging, and slowing them. Also deals damage to all heroes within 250 radius of its landing area. Cooldown is reduced by 50% if kicking a creep.

facets.name: skywrath_mage_shield
facets.title: Shield of the Scion
facets.description: Skywrath Mage gains a magic damage barrier when dealing damage to heroes.

facets.name: skywrath_mage_staff
facets.title: Staff of the Scion
facets.description: Skywrath Mage's Cooldowns are reduced when he deals spell damage to enemy heroes.

shard.shard_desc: When Skywrath Mage casts Arcane Bolt, 3 bolts are created, one aimed at the original target, and two others aimed at random enemies within %extra_bolt_search_radius% range of the original target. Heroes will take priority.

aghanim_scepter.scepter_desc: When Skywrath Mage casts Mystic Flare, another Mystic Flare will be created on the position of a different random target enemy within 500 range of the original target. Heroes will take priority.

facets.name: abaddon_death_dude
facets.title: The Quickening
facets.description: Units dying nearby Abaddon lower his cooldowns.

facets.name: abaddon_mephitic_shroud
facets.title: Mephitic Shroud
facets.description: Aphotic Shield absorbs more damage and reflects damage when received instead of exploding at the end.

facets.name: abaddon_mists_of_fate
facets.title: Malignant Mist
facets.description: Mist Coil also deals 40/60/80/100% attack damage and applies effects from items and abilities. Self Damage increased when targeting enemies.

shard.shard_desc: 75% of absorbed damage is dealt to nearby enemies.

aghanim_scepter.scepter_desc: Increases duration. While Borrowed Time is active, anytime an ally takes more than 550 damage while within Mist Coil's cast range of Abaddon, an individual Mist Coil will automatically fire towards that ally.

facets.name: elder_titan_deconstruction
facets.title: Deconstruction
facets.description: Natural Order drains Magic Resistance and Armor over time.

facets.name: elder_titan_boost_atkspd
facets.title: Momentum
facets.description: Elder Titan's Base Attack Speed is reduced but his Movement Speed also grants Attack Speed.

shard.shard_desc: Lowers Cooldown. Echo Stomp may be placed on alt-cast to allow Elder Titan to take the place of the Astral Spirit as it completes its stomp.

aghanim_scepter.scepter_desc: Causes Elder Titan to become debuff immune and gain 50% magic resistance for 2 seconds per affected enemy Hero when the spirit returns.

facets.name: legion_commander_stonehall_plate
facets.title: Stonehall Plate
facets.description: Overwhelming Odds grants an all damage barrier based on the damage it deals to enemy heroes.

facets.name: legion_commander_spoils_of_war
facets.title: Spoils of War
facets.description: When a Duel is won, units that damaged the loser during the Duel will gain permanent bonus damage. If Legion Commander won the Duel, she will automatically cast Press the Attack on herself and assisting allies.

shard.shard_desc: Overwhelming Odds has larger radius and grants an all damage barrier based on the damage it deals to enemy heroes.

aghanim_scepter.scepter_desc: When Legion Commander wins a duel, Press the Attack is automatically triggered around her.

facets.name: ember_spirit_double_impact
facets.title: Double Impact
facets.description: Sleight of Fist hits one of its targets an extra time.

facets.name: ember_spirit_chain_gang
facets.title: Chain Gang
facets.description: Searing Chains can affect two additional enemies. When Searing Chains are cast, they are also cast around each Fire Remnant.

shard.shard_desc: If an enemy hero dies near Ember Spirit, a Fire Remnant charge will be replenished.

aghanim_scepter.scepter_desc: Increases cast range, initial remnant speed, and maximum charges.

aghanim_scepter.scepter_desc:
Upon gaining this ability and every 90 sec, the hero draws a random tarot card. The hero always knows which card will be next. Only one card can be active at a time.
«Death»: +40% spell damage.
«Fool»: +100% gold gained.
«World»: +150% intelligence.
«Lovers»: +40% healing amplification.
«Tower»: barrier against all damage types with 400 health (regenerates if no damage is taken for 7 sec.)

Minefield Sign is destroyed after this effect ends.
